repair_candidate.summary: Repair and finalize contributor PR #88681, which adds runtime plugin load progress diagnostics so startup stalls identify attempted, completed, and in-flight plugin ids in embedded-agent and cron timeout reporting. Do not merge until live checks, mergeability, hydrated human/bot review comments, targeted validation, and Codex /review are clean.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix: make runtime plugin stalls diagnosable
repair_candidate.pr_body:
## Summary
Repair and finalize source PR #88681 so runtime plugin startup stalls report attempted, completed, and in-flight plugin ids in embedded-agent and cron timeout diagnostics.

## Source and credit
This work is based on https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88681 by @alexzhu0. Clownfish should preserve that attribution in any follow-up commits, merge notes, or replacement path.

## Scope
Keep the scope to Ask #1 from #87327: name the plugin involved in a runtime plugin loading stall. Do not close #87327 because the PR body explicitly leaves Asks #2-#5 as follow-up work.

## Validation
- pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts
- pnpm check:changed
- Codex /review, with all findings addressed before merge

## Merge gates
Hydrate checks, mergeability, human comments, review-bot comments, and review threads. Merge only if security remains cleared, checks pass or are explicitly accepted by maintainers, review findings are resolved, and the branch is current with main.
validation_commands: pnpm -s vitest run src/agents/runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/isolated-agent/run.runtime-plugins.test.ts src/cron/service/execution-errors.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/plugins/loader.test.ts
credit_notes: Preserve contributor credit for @alexzhu0 as the author of source PR https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/pull/88681.
If Clownfish has to make follow-up commits while repairing the contributor branch, keep the PR as the canonical path and acknowledge @alexzhu0 in the final merge/PR notes.
If a replacement PR unexpectedly becomes necessary later, its body must name #88681 as the source PR and carry @alexzhu0 attribution.
